_comment: Item Properties: Nine-Color Flame. Per physical-size directive: every object has lore-accurate physical size, not block size. Length: 0.3 m, Weight: 0 jin, Material: pure law-flame, Suitable realm: Immortal, Body strength required: Spirit Severing. Prime Directive: physical size exists objectively; cultivation determines what the player can lift/activate.
name: Nine-Color Flame

usage_requirements.effect_when_undersized: Cannot contain; flame burns the holder.

canon_note: The nine-color flame of the Vermilion Bird.

simulation_notes.no_locked_upgrades: A cultivator who later reaches the required body strength will be able to lift/activate the item; the item does not change, only the cultivator does.
simulation_notes.canon_fidelity: This reflects the novels: Wang Lin could not lift the God-Slaying Sword until his body cultivation matched; he could barely use it as a heavy physical weapon before then.
